Adaptive Pricing requires working webhoo: Adaptive Pricing requires working webhooks. Your Stripe webhooks are currently disabled, so it can’t be enabled.
Your checkout is optimized for sales by: Your checkout is optimised for sales by dynamically displaying the most relevant payment methods you've enabled for each customer.
Stripe Optimized Checkout is now active: Stripe Optimised Checkout is now active
*Data is from Stripe global holdback stu: *Data is from Stripe global holdback study conducted in 2024.
Your checkout now shows prices in shoppe: Your checkout now shows prices in shoppers' local currency across 150+ countries, growing cross-border revenue by an average of 17.8%. Stripe handles real-time exchange rates with no currency conversion fees.
Stripe Adaptive Pricing is now active: Stripe Adaptive Pricing is now active
Optimized Checkout Suite and Adaptive Pr: Optimised Checkout Suite and Adaptive Pricing illustration
*Data is from Stripe global holdback stu: *Data is from Stripe global holdback study conducted in 2024
Your checkout dynamically displays avail: Your checkout dynamically displays available payment methods most likely to drive conversions. International shoppers also see prices in their local currency, growing cross-border revenue by an average of 17.8%.
Stripe Optimized Checkout Suite and Adap: Stripe Optimised Checkout Suite and Adaptive Pricing are now active
Test mode cannot be enabled before you h: Test mode cannot be enabled before you have connected a test Stripe account.
Live mode cannot be enabled before you h: Live mode cannot be enabled before you have connected a live Stripe account.
Optimized Checkout Suite is not currentl: Optimised Checkout Suite is not currently available. Please try to reconnect your account to Stripe, but if that doesn't work, please contact our support team.
Adaptive Pricing is only available when: Adaptive Pricing is only available when Optimised Checkout Suite is enabled.
When enabled, your product catalog will: When enabled, your product catalogue will be synced to Stripe and AI agents will be able to purchase on behalf of your customers.
Get the webhook signing secret in the St: Get the webhook signing secret in the Stripe dashboard to enable this feature.
Go to {{strong}}Developers > Webhooks{{\: Go to {{strong}}Developers > Webhooks{{/strong}} and copy and paste the webhook secret into the field below
Setup webhooks in {{strong}}Account deta: Setup webhooks in {{strong}}Account details{{/strong}} above, then set endpoint URL to your webhook URL
Follow the setup instructions to enable: Follow the setup instructions to enable the feature
Log into your {{agenticLink}}Stripe Dash: Log into your {{agenticLink}}Stripe Dashboard{{/agenticLink}} and go to {{strong}}Payments > Agentic commerce{{/strong}}
Enable and configure agentic commerce fo: Enable and configure agentic commerce for your store.
Sync failed. Check the WooCommerce logs: Sync failed. Check the WooCommerce logs for details.
No syncs yet. Feed will sync automatical: No syncs yet. Feed will sync automatically every 15 minutes.
Monitors the product feed sync status fo: Monitors the product feed sync status for the agentic commerce integration.
Adaptive Pricing is unavailable as your: Adaptive Pricing is unavailable as your account does not support settlement in your store currency.
We cannot identify which settlement curr: We cannot identify which settlement currencies are available for your account.
Adaptive Pricing is not available in you: Adaptive Pricing is not available in your country.
With Adaptive Pricing, Stripe detects th: With Adaptive Pricing, Stripe detects the customer's currency and allows them to pay using their local currency and enabled local payment methods. <learnMoreLink>Learn more</learnMoreLink>.
View results on the Stripe Dashboard: View results on the Stripe Dashboard
Optimized Checkout works best when Strip: Optimised Checkout works best when Stripe is your first payment method. Move it to the top to start optimising for conversions.
Automatically calculate and collect sale: Automatically calculate and collect sales tax, value-added tax (VAT), and goods and services tax (GST) wherever you sell. {{docLink}}Learn more{{/docLink}} about how Stripe Tax keeps you compliant.
Automate tax compliance with Stripe Tax: Automate tax compliance with Stripe Tax
Error moving Stripe to the top of the pa: Error moving Stripe to the top of the payment methods list.
Stripe is now the first option in checko: Stripe is now the first option in checkout.
Let customers pay in their local currenc: Let customers pay in their local currency with Adaptive Pricing
Credit card \/ debit card payment method: Credit card / debit card payment method must be enabled in order to use %1$s.
%1$s is unavailable due to the store tax: %1$s is unavailable due to the store tax setup being based on the customer's billing address.
Connect or create a Stripe account to ac: Connect or create a Stripe account to accept all major debit and credit cards, digital wallets (including Apple Pay and Google Pay), buy now, pay later options (such as Klarna and Affirm), and a wide range of local and international payment methods.
Live mode requires a valid SSL certifica: Live mode requires a valid SSL certificate. Please enable SSL on your site to connect a live Stripe account.
If enabled, returning customers can chec: If enabled, returning customers can check out using payment details securely stored by Stripe. No payment information is stored on your store.
Some payment methods are automatically e: Some payment methods are automatically enabled when you connect your account. Review your Payment Methods settings for details.
{{strong}}Amazon Pay does not support ta: {{strong}}Amazon Pay does not support taxes based on the billing address.{{/strong}} The checkout button will not be visible to shoppers with this setting in effect.
Let customers save Bancontact as a SEPA: Let customers save Bancontact as a SEPA Direct Debit method for future purchases. Requires Bancontact to be enabled.
Let customers save iDEAL | Wero as a SEP: Let customers save iDEAL | Wero as a SEPA Direct Debit method for future purchases. Requires iDEAL | Wero to be enabled.
Enable saved Bancontact payments for rep: Enable saved Bancontact payments for repeat payments
Enable saved iDEAL | Wero payments for r: Enable saved iDEAL | Wero payments for repeat payments
You're using Stripe's Optimized Checkout: You're using Stripe's Optimised Checkout Suite to dynamically display the most relevant payment methods you've enabled to each customer. {{docLink}}Learn more{{/docLink}}
Choose between a vertical accordion layo: Choose between a vertical accordion layout and a horizontal tabs layout to display payment methods.
Optimize your checkout experience for mo: Optimise your checkout experience for more sales by dynamically displaying the most relevant payment methods you've enabled for each customer. {{docLink}}Learn more{{/docLink}} about Stripe's Optimised Checkout Suite.
Increase conversion with Stripe's Optimi: Increase conversion with Stripe's Optimised Checkout Suite
Stripe's Optimized Checkout Suite uses A: Stripe's Optimised Checkout Suite uses AI models to order the most relevant payment methods you've enabled for each of your customers dynamically. <learnMoreLink>Learn more</learnMoreLink>.
Dynamically display the most relevant pa: Dynamically display the most relevant payment methods you've enabled
%1$s is unavailable due to another offic: %1$s is unavailable due to another official plugin being active.
When enabled, payment debug logs will be: When enabled, payment debug logs will be saved to WooCommerce > Status > Logs.
Affirm and Klarna payments are auto-enab: Affirm and Klarna payments are auto-enabled with Stripe for eligible merchants.
Flexible pay-over-time options can boost: Flexible pay-over-time options can boost revenue by up to 14%*.
Offer more ways to pay with Buy Now, Pay: Offer more ways to pay with Buy Now, Pay Later
We couldn't connect to your account, it: We couldn't connect to your account, it seems like the live API keys we've saved for you are no longer valid. Please use the Configure connection button below to reconnect.
We couldn't connect to your account, it seems like the test API keys we've saved for you are no longer valid. Please use the Configure connection button below to reconnect.
Australia BECS Direct Debit enables your: Australia BECS Direct Debit enables your store to accept payments from customers with an Australian bank account.
BLIK enables customers in Poland to pay: BLIK enables customers in Poland to pay directly via online payouts from their bank account.
Canadian Pre-Authorized Debit is a payme: Canadian Pre-Authorised Debit is a payment method that allows customers to pay using their Canadian bank account.
Enhance sales by providing a quick, stra: Enhance sales by providing a quick, straightforward, and secure checkout experience. By activating this feature, you accept the terms of use for {{stripeLink}}Stripe{{/stripeLink}} and {{amazonLink}}Amazon{{/amazonLink}}.
ACH lets you accept payments from custom: ACH lets you accept payments from customers with a US bank account.
Bacs Direct Debit enables customers in t: Bacs Direct Debit enables customers in the UK to pay by providing their bank account details.
Allow customers to pay over time with Af: Allow customers to pay over time with Afterpay. {{limitsLink}}Transaction limits vary by country{{/limitsLink}}.
Allow customers to pay over time with Cl: Allow customers to pay over time with Clearpay. {{limitsLink}}Transaction limits vary by country{{/limitsLink}}.
Allow customers to pay over time. Availa: Allow customers to pay over time. Available to all customers paying in %1$s. Purchases from %2$s %3$s to 30,000 %4$s are eligible for Affirm financing.
Charge must be captured on the order det: Charge must be captured on the order details screen within 7 days of authorisation, otherwise the authorisation and order will be cancelled. {{learnMoreLink}}Learn more{{/learnMoreLink}}
Your Stripe API keys have expired, pleas: Your Stripe API keys have expired, please refresh your keys, or re-connect your account.
Your store is connected to Stripe via th: Your store is connected to Stripe via the WooCommerce Stripe App.
%s is {{stripeDashboardLink}}pending app: %s is {{stripeDashboardLink}}pending approval{{/stripeDashboardLink}}. Once approved, you will be able to use it.
Re-connect your Stripe account using the: Re-connect your Stripe account using the new authentication flow by clicking the "Re-authenticate" button and make your store safer.
By clicking \"Connect an account\", you: By clicking "Connect an account", you agree to the {{tosLink}}Terms of service.{{/tosLink}}
By clicking \"Connect a test account\",: By clicking "Connect a test account", you agree to the {{tosLink}}Terms of service.{{/tosLink}}
Connect with Stripe in live mode: Connect with Stripe in live mode
Connect with Stripe in test mode: Connect with Stripe in test mode
Webhooks have been manually configured v: Webhooks have been manually configured via a webhook secret.
Your store has Stripe Account keys, howe: Your store has Stripe Account keys, however, we cannot verify their origin, please re-connect.
An issue occurred generating a connectio: An issue occurred generating a connection to Stripe, please ensure your server has a valid SSL certificate and try again.{{br /}}For assistance, refer to our {{Link}}documentation{{/Link}}.
Create or connect a test account: Create or connect a test account
Click the {{configureButtonText\/}} butt: Click the {{configureButtonText/}} button to {{settingsLink}}configure a webhook{{/settingsLink}}. This will complete your Stripe account connection process.
Your webhooks are configured and will be: Your webhooks are configured and will be sent to: {{webhookURL}}%s{{/webhookURL}}.
Configuring webhooks will enable your st: Configuring webhooks will enable your store to receive notifications on charge statuses from Stripe.
Only cards, Affirm, Afterpay, and Klarna: Only cards, Affirm, Afterpay, and Klarna support manual capture. When enabled, all other payment methods will be hidden from checkout.
WeChat Pay is a popular mobile payment a: WeChat Pay is a popular mobile payment and digital wallet service by WeChat in China.
Cash App is a popular consumer app in th: Cash App is a popular consumer app in the US that allows customers to bank, invest, send, and receive money using their digital wallet.
Allow customers to pay over time with Kl: Allow customers to pay over time with Klarna.
There was an error. Please reload the pa: There was an error. Please reload the page and try again.
Customize the display order of Stripe pa: Customise the display order of Stripe payment methods for customers at checkout. This customisation occurs within the plugin and won't affect the order in relation to other installed payment providers.
%1$s requires store currency to be set t: %1$s requires store currency to be set to %2$s. {{currencySettingsLink}}Set currency{{/currencySettingsLink}}
All settings will be cleared and your cu: All settings will be cleared and your customers will no longer be able to pay using cards and other payment methods offered by Stripe. Due to this change, you might be required to create a new Stripe account should you want to reactivate.
Enable and configure advanced features f: Enable and configure advanced features for your store.
You can change the description your cust: You can change the description your customers will see on their bank statement in your {{settingsLink}}Stripe account settings{{/settingsLink}}. Set this to a recognisable name – e.g. the legal entity name or website address – to avoid potential disputes and chargebacks.
We'll use the shortened descriptor in co: We'll use the shortened descriptor in combination with the customer order number. You can change the shortened description in your {{settingsLink}}Stripe account settings{{/settingsLink}}.
Link autofills your customers\u2019 paym: Link autofills your customers’ payment and shipping details to deliver an easy and seamless checkout experience. New checkout experience needs to be enabled for Link. By enabling this feature, you agree to the {{stripeLinkTerms}}Link by Stripe terms{{/stripeLinkTerms}}, and {{privacyPolicy}}Privacy Policy{{/privacyPolicy}}.
Boost sales by offering a fast, simple,: Boost sales by offering a fast, simple, and secure checkout experience.By enabling this feature, you agree to {{stripeLink}}Stripe{{/stripeLink}}, {{appleLink}}Apple{{/appleLink}}, and {{googleLink}}Google{{/googleLink}}'s terms of use.
Set the number of days until expiration: Set the number of days until expiration from 0 to 60 days. The default is 3 days.
You can now accept payments with %s.
Boleto is an official payment method in: Boleto is an official payment method in Brazil. Customers receive a voucher that can be paid at authorised agencies or banks, ATMs, or online bank portals.
OXXO is a Mexican chain of convenience s: OXXO is a Mexican chain of convenience stores that allows customers to pay bills and online purchases in-store with cash.
Describe how customers should use this p: Describe how customers should use this payment method during checkout.
Enter a name which customers will see du: Enter a name which customers will see during checkout.
When enabled, %s will appear on checkout: When enabled, %s will appear on checkout.
Customer Geography: France, Germany, Spa: Customer Geography: France, Germany, Spain, Belgium, Netherlands, Luxembourg, Italy, Portugal, Austria, Ireland.
Are you sure you want to disconnect your: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Stripe account from your WooCommerce store?
%s requires activation in your {{stripeD: %s requires activation in your {{stripeDashboardLink}}Stripe dashboard{{/stripeDashboardLink}}. Follow the instructions there and check back soon.
Multibanco is an interbank network that: Multibanco is an interbank network that links the ATMs of all major banks in Portugal, allowing customers to pay through either their ATM or online banking environment.
Alipay is a popular wallet in China, ope: Alipay is a popular wallet in China, operated by Ant Financial Services Group, a financial services provider affiliated with Alibaba.
Updating payment methods information, pl: Updating payment methods information, please wait.
%s cannot be enabled at checkout. Click: %s cannot be enabled at checkout. Click to expand.
%s is not available to your customers wh: %s is not available to your customers when the "manual capture" setting is enabled.
Use {{testCardNumbersLink}}test card num: Use {{testCardNumbersLink}}test card numbers{{/testCardNumbersLink}} to simulate various transactions. {{learnMoreLink}}Learn more{{/learnMoreLink}}
You must capture the payment on the orde: You must capture the payment on the order details screen within 7 days of authorisation, otherwise the money will return to the shopper.
Are you sure you want to enable manual c: Are you sure you want to enable manual capture of payments?
By clicking \"Create or connect an accou: By clicking "Create or connect an account", you agree to the {{tosLink}}Terms of service.{{/tosLink}}
Configure optional payment settings and: Configure optional payment settings and transaction details.
View account overview and edit business: View account overview and edit business details.
When enabled, payment methods powered by: When enabled, payment methods powered by Stripe will appear on checkout.
When enabled, we'll include the order nu: When enabled, we'll include the order number for card and express checkout transactions.
Add customer order number to the bank st: Add customer order number to the bank statement
Issue an authorization on checkout, and: Issue an authorisation on checkout, and capture later
Payments\/payouts may be disabled for th: Payments/payouts may be disabled for this account until missing business information is updated. Update now
Accept secure bank transfers from Austri: Accept secure bank transfers from Austria, Belgium, Germany, Italy, Netherlands, and Spain.
Reach 500 million customers and over 20: Reach 500 million customers and over 20 million businesses across the European Union.
Przelewy24 is a Poland-based payment met: Przelewy24 is a Poland-based payment method aggregator that allows customers to complete transactions online using bank transfers and other methods.
iDEAL | Wero is a Netherlands-based paym: iDEAL | Wero is a Netherlands-based payment method that allows customers to complete transactions online using their bank credentials.
EPS is an Austria-based payment method t: EPS is an Austria-based payment method that allows customers to complete transactions online using their bank credentials.
Let your customers pay with major credit: Let your customers pay with major credit and debit cards without leaving your store.
Bancontact is the most popular online pa: Bancontact is the most popular online payment method in Belgium, with over 15 million cards in circulation.
Let your customers use their favorite ex: Let your customers use their favourite express payment methods and digital wallets for faster, more secure checkouts across different parts of your store.
Select payments available to customers a: Select payments available to customers at checkout. Based on their device type, location, and purchase history, your customers will only see the most relevant payment methods.
Enable or disable Stripe on your store,: Enable or disable Stripe on your store, enter activation keys, and turn on test mode to simulate transactions.
